zh.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz是Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm和Ursula Mayer的女兒，於1681年3月2日出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆。她於1708年11月13日與Johann Adam Tresenreuther在德國貝也纽伦堡結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz是Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm和Ursula Mayer的女儿，于1681年3月2日出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆。她于1708年11月13日与Johann Adam Tresenreuther在德国貝也纽伦堡结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kurz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Hans, Jutta, Armin, Benno, Fritz, Gunter, Heinz, Hermann, Horst, Manfred, Otto.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Kurtz  .

variants.name: Kortz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Aloys, Ulrich.

variants.name: Curts
meanings: Americanized form of German   Kurz   or   Kurtz  .

variants.name: Kurtz
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone who was short in stature, from Middle High German kur(t)z, German kurz ‘short’.

variants.name: Curz
meanings: Probably an altered form of German   Kurz  .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Magdalena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Magdalene
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

en.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz was born on 2 March 1681, in Ulm, Württemberg, Germany as the daughter of Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm and Ursula Mayer. She married Johann Adam Tresenreuther on 13 November 1708, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz est née le 2 mars 1681, à Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Allemagne, fille de Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm et Ursula Mayer. Elle a épousé Johann Adam Tresenreuther le 13 novembre 1708, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz wurde am 2. März 1681 in Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Deutschland, als Tochter von Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm und Ursula Mayer geboren. Sie hat am 13. November 1708 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland Johann Adam Tresenreuther geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz è nata il il 2 marzo 1681 nel Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Germania come figlia di Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm e Ursula Mayer. Lei sposato Johann Adam Tresenreuther il 13 novembre 1708, nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurzは1681年3月2日にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ウルムでDaniel Kurtz Handelsmann in UlmとUrsula Mayerの娘として生まれた。1708年11月13日にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグでJohann Adam Tresenreutherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz(은)는 1681년 3월 2일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 울름에서 Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm(와)과 Ursula Mayer의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1708년 11월 13일 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 Johann Adam Tresenreuther(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz nasceu em 2 de março de 1681, em Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemanha filha de Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm e Ursula Mayer. Ela casou-se com Johann Adam Tresenreuther em 13 de novembro de 1708, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz родилась 2 марта 1681 г. в местности обирамт улм, вuрттембирг, Германия. Её родителей звали Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm и Ursula Mayer. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Adam Tresenreuther 13 ноября 1708 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Maria Magdalena Kurz nació el 2 de marzo de 1681, en Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemania como hija de Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm y Ursula Mayer. Se casó con Johann Adam Tresenreuther el 13 de noviembre de 1708, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas.
